findings.title: Remove ~20 unused dependencies
findings.what: Remove all unused Radix UI packages (accordion, alert-dialog, aspect-ratio, avatar, checkbox, collapsible, context-menu, dialog, dropdown-menu, hover-card, menubar, navigation-menu, popover, progress, radio-group, scroll-area, select, separator, slider, switch, tabs, toggle, toggle-group, tooltip), plus cmdk, embla-carousel-react, input-otp, react-day-picker, react-hook-form, react-resizable-panels, recharts, vaul, next-themes, sonner, class-variance-authority. These are leftover shadcn/ui scaffolding never used in the WinXP redesign.
findings.why: ~400-500KB of unused JS shipped to users. Faster installs, smaller bundle, reduced attack surface. Also eliminates noise in dependency audits.

findings.title: Add generateMetadata to project detail pages
findings.what: The project detail page is a client component with no metadata export. Convert to server component (or add a separate generateMetadata export) so each project gets proper title, description, and og:tags. Currently all project pages show the generic site title in search results and social previews.
findings.why: SEO and social sharing — project pages are the most linkable content on the site but currently have zero unique metadata.

findings.title: Fix empty githubUrl rendering on GreenLine
findings.what: GreenLine has `githubUrl: ""` in projects.ts. The project detail page (line 164) renders the Source link unconditionally, producing a broken link. Add a guard: `{project.githubUrl && ( ... )}`.
findings.why: Broken link on a shipped project page — bad UX and hurts SEO link equity.

findings.title: Add not-found.tsx and error.tsx
findings.what: No custom 404 or error boundary exists. An invalid route shows the default Next.js 404. Add WinXP-themed not-found.tsx (BSOD or error dialog style) and a basic error.tsx boundary.
findings.why: Consistent brand experience on error states. Currently a jarring break from the WinXP aesthetic when hitting a bad URL.

findings.title: Add rel=noopener to external links in HomeWindow
findings.what: Lines 171-185: GitHub and LinkedIn links use `target="_blank"` without `rel="noopener noreferrer"`. Add the missing rel attribute.
findings.why: Minor security hardening — prevents reverse tabnabbing. Other files (ProjectDetailWindow toolbar) already have it, so this is an inconsistency.

findings.title: Use 100dvh instead of 100vh for mobile viewport
findings.what: The `.winxp-desktop` class uses `height: 100vh` which doesn't account for mobile browser chrome (address bar). Change to `height: 100dvh` with `100vh` fallback for older browsers.
findings.why: On mobile Safari/Chrome, 100vh causes content to extend behind the address bar, creating scroll issues on the desktop view.

findings.title: Centralize project slug/emoji/color mappings
findings.what: Project emojis, colors, and featured slugs are hardcoded in 3+ separate files (ProjectsWindow PROJECT_EMOJIS/PROJECT_COLORS, TerminalWindow PROJECTS object, HomeWindow FEATURED_SLUGS). Move emoji and color into the project data model in projects.ts so there's one source of truth.
findings.why: Adding or renaming a project requires touching 4 files. Single source of truth reduces bugs and makes the data model self-documenting.
